description: Blocks that don't drop themselves when broken, even with silk touch. Data sourced from minecraft.wiki

entries.name: minecraft:chain
entries.note: Drops itself when broken with shears, otherwise nothing

entries.name: minecraft:cave_vines
entries.note: Drops nothing when mined without bone meal

entries.name: minecraft:cave_vines_plant
entries.note: Drops nothing when mined without bone meal

entries.name: minecraft:kelp
entries.note: Drops nothing when water is present

entries.name: minecraft:seagrass
entries.note: Drops nothing when water is present

entries.name: minecraft:kelp_plant
entries.note: Drops nothing when water is present
